subject: docs: sync documentation with codebase reality
body:
CLAUDE.md: Added 4 missing migrations (fix_price_history_trigger_rls,
fix_update_coords_not_found, add_station_fields, update_bulk_insert_stations).

TESTING_GUIDE.md: Corrected test counts — was "36" (line 20) and "30"
(line 148), actual is 52 (43 formatting + 9 integration).

HISTORY.md: Added March 12-13 entries covering extended station fields,
bulk import update, code review fixes, and audit fixes.

TODO.md: Updated stale migration reference from 20260305000004 to 20260312000002.
